subcodes.first_line: O servant of Bahá, O Muhammad-Báqir! Cause the children to enter the divine school and, like a teacher of love, impart instruction [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده بهاء ای محمد باقر اطفال را در دبستان الهی داخل کن و چون ادیب عشق تعلیم
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
